title: Senior Software Engineer - Newgen Software - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Newgen Software - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Newgen Software. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Lucknow-based team.

About Newgen Software:
Newgen Software is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Newgen Software!
